name: CompletionRecorder

neutralConcepts: SETNX on (questionnaireId, userId) before any write
answers[] fetched from store — never from event payload
knowledgeScope PRIVATE — completion record is per-user

ironRules.rule: SETNX on (questionnaireId, userId) before any write — duplicate submission returns success without re-writing
answers[] are fetched from xiigen-questionnaire-answers store — never from the event payload directly
DNA-8: storeDocument BEFORE CompletionRecorded enqueue. Order: store-completion → enqueue.
knowledgeScope = PRIVATE — completion records are per-user and must not be stored as GLOBAL

keywords: completion recorder setnx idempotency questionnaire answers store private
